news.paragraph: SMH is showing some wavering as oil prices surge past $100, with Nvidia also seeing a dip. This broad market movement, alongside a significant IPO filing from SpaceX, suggests a cautious sentiment in the tech sector. Traders should monitor semiconductor-specific news flow for any divergence from the broader market trends.

headlines.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall As Oil Prices Top $100; Nvidia Wavers, Walmart Falls, SpaceX Files For Huge IPO
